331 Huntington Hill N, Rochester, NY 14622, USA

On a private road in Huntington Hills near Durand Eastman Park. These are small green crabapples, perhaps leftover from the neighborhoods days as an apple orchard. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: September-November.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
Huge abundant bushes along the hedgerow to the right of the steps headed up to White Lady's Castle. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-September.

Park Office, 100 Zoo Rd, Rochester, NY 14617, USA

Full-size Asian Pear tree, assuming it's wild grown. Delicious small oblong fruit, with a crisp, bubblegum flavor. I've gone out of my way to check ripeness and harvest from this tree the last few years; these pears are that good! Picking pole would be helpful
Earliest ripe berries I've found. Access: Public.
